faqSection.title:
What clients
ask us
most often.
faqSection.intro: Answers on fixed prices, build time, materials and warranty. We're happy to clarify any further questions in person.

faq.q: How is a binding fixed price arrived at?
faq.a: After the initial conversation, we take measurements on site, check the structure and fabric and draw up a detailed schedule of works. Within 14 days you receive a written fixed price — valid for 60 days and binding once the contract is signed.

faq.q: How quickly can you start the work?
faq.a: Usually 4–8 weeks after the contract is concluded. Often sooner for apartment renovations, and correspondingly longer for projects requiring permits (structure, roof, façade). We commit to the start date.

Our site management, electrical, plumbing, drywall, painting and joinery are in-house. Tilers, roofers and façade specialists are long-standing partner firms under contract — no day labourers, no repeated hand-offs.

faq.q: What is included in the fixed price?
faq.a: All materials as selected, all trades, site management, construction-waste disposal, cleaning, dealings with authorities and insurance. Not included: special requests made after the contract is signed (shown separately) and ownership levies.

faq.q: Can I stay in the apartment during the renovation?
faq.a: For apartments with a partial renovation (e.g. only the bathroom or kitchen): yes, with limited use. For full renovations we recommend moving out — we help with interim furnishing and logistics.
Five years' workmanship warranty on all completed work — more than the statutory requirement. The manufacturer's warranty applies to materials, which we assert on your behalf.
